alt.zh-TW: Music Intelligence Platform 的完整 Playwright 導覽錄影。
alt.en: Full Playwright guided tour recording of Music Intelligence Platform.

caption.zh-TW: 展示資料生成、清理、特徵工程、模型訓練、搜尋、推薦、相似歌曲、artist network、evaluation 與 analytics 儀表板。
caption.en: Shows data generation, cleaning, feature engineering, model training, search, recommendations, similar tracks, artist network, evaluation, and analytics dashboards.

alt.zh-TW: Music Intelligence Platform 首頁，呈現音樂資料分析與推薦系統入口。
alt.en: Music Intelligence Platform home screen showing the music analytics and recommendation entry point.

caption.zh-TW: 音樂知識檢索、推薦與分析平台的主畫面，集中呈現 catalog、pipeline 與推薦系統入口。
caption.en: Main screen for the music knowledge search, recommendation, and analytics platform.

alt.zh-TW: Pipeline Journey 頁面展示音樂資料從 ingestion 到模型與檢索索引的流程。
alt.en: Pipeline Journey page showing music data flowing from ingestion to models and retrieval indexes.

caption.zh-TW: 用流程圖方式呈現 sample data、ETL、feature store、recommendation models 與 search index 的關係。
caption.en: Visualizes sample data, ETL, feature store, recommendation models, and search index relationships.

alt.zh-TW: 搜尋結果頁展示 BM25、向量檢索與 hybrid ranking 結果。
alt.en: Search results page showing BM25, vector retrieval, and hybrid ranking results.

caption.zh-TW: 歌曲檢索頁支援關鍵字、向量與 hybrid RRF 搜尋，展示排名與 metadata。
caption.en: Track retrieval page supporting keyword, vector, and hybrid RRF search with ranking metadata.

alt.zh-TW: 推薦頁展示使用者歌曲推薦與解釋訊號。
alt.en: Recommendation page showing user recommendations and explanation signals.

caption.zh-TW: 以音訊特徵、標籤、使用者互動與模型分數支援歌曲推薦結果。
caption.en: Recommendations supported by audio features, tags, user signals, and model scores.

alt.zh-TW: 相似歌曲頁面展示 item-item similarity 與相似度排序。
alt.en: Similar tracks page showing item-item similarity and ranked matches.

caption.zh-TW: 以音訊向量、metadata 與 tag features 找出相似歌曲，支援 cold-start demo。
caption.en: Finds similar tracks through audio vectors, metadata, and tag features for cold-start exploration.

alt.zh-TW: Artist Network 頁面展示 artist co-listen network 與關聯節點。
alt.en: Artist Network page showing artist co-listen network and related nodes.

caption.zh-TW: 用共同聆聽訊號建立 artist graph，呈現音樂品味網路與 artist proximity。
caption.en: Builds an artist graph from co-listening signals to show taste networks and artist proximity.

alt.zh-TW: Evaluation dashboard 展示 precision、recall、nDCG、coverage、novelty 等推薦指標。
alt.en: Evaluation dashboard showing precision, recall, nDCG, coverage, novelty, and recommendation metrics.

caption.zh-TW: 比較 popularity、item-item、ALS、content-based 與 hybrid recommender 的排序表現。
caption.en: Compares popularity, item-item, ALS, content-based, and hybrid recommender ranking performance.

alt.zh-TW: Genre dashboard 展示曲庫 genre 分佈與音訊特徵概況。
alt.en: Genre dashboard showing catalog genre distribution and audio feature summaries.

caption.zh-TW: 從 genre、tempo、energy、danceability 等角度檢視 synthetic catalog 的資料分佈。
caption.en: Explores synthetic catalog distribution by genre, tempo, energy, danceability, and other features.

alt.zh-TW: Listening Patterns 頁面展示使用者聆聽行為與偏好變化。
alt.en: Listening Patterns page showing user listening behavior and preference changes.

caption.zh-TW: 以 cohort、時間與互動訊號分析使用者品味輪廓與推薦系統輸入。
caption.en: Analyzes taste profiles and recommender inputs through cohorts, time, and interaction signals.

alt.zh-TW: User DNA 頁面以 radar chart 呈現使用者音樂品味特徵。
alt.en: User DNA page using a radar chart to present listener taste features.

caption.zh-TW: 把使用者偏好轉成可視化 profile，輔助解釋個人化推薦。
caption.en: Turns user preference features into a visual profile for explaining personalization.

alt.zh-TW: Model Disagreement 頁面展示不同推薦模型之間的結果差異。
alt.en: Model Disagreement page showing differences between recommender model outputs.

caption.zh-TW: 比較 ALS、content-based、item similarity 與 hybrid 的推薦重疊與差異。
caption.en: Compares overlap and divergence among ALS, content-based, item similarity, and hybrid recommendations.

alt.zh-TW: Popularity Bias 頁面展示熱門度偏差與長尾曲庫分佈。
alt.en: Popularity Bias page showing popularity bias and long-tail catalog distribution.

caption.zh-TW: 檢查推薦結果是否過度集中在高播放量歌曲，並觀察 long-tail coverage。
caption.en: Checks whether recommendations over-concentrate on popular tracks and shows long-tail coverage.

alt.zh-TW: Geography analytics 頁面展示地理分佈與聆聽偏好。
alt.en: Geography analytics page showing geographic distribution and listening preferences.

caption.zh-TW: 用區域與使用者訊號觀察音樂品味差異，補充推薦系統的分析視角。
caption.en: Uses regional and user signals to inspect taste differences as another recommender analytics lens.

alt.zh-TW: Catalog Timeline 頁面展示曲庫年代與資料分佈。
alt.en: Catalog Timeline page showing catalog years and data distribution.

caption.zh-TW: 檢視曲庫年代分布與 catalog coverage，輔助理解訓練資料範圍。
caption.en: Inspects catalog year distribution and coverage to explain the training data scope.

alt.zh-TW: 導覽步驟 1 展示資料生成階段。
alt.en: Tour step 1 showing the data generation stage.

alt.zh-TW: 導覽步驟 5 展示模型訓練階段。
alt.en: Tour step 5 showing the model training stage.

alt.zh-TW: 導覽步驟 10 展示 artist network 分析。
alt.en: Tour step 10 showing artist network analytics.

alt.zh-TW: 導覽完成畫面，表示使用者已看完整個 Music Intelligence Platform walkthrough。
alt.en: Tour completed screen after the full Music Intelligence Platform walkthrough.
